packageRules.description: Topic Docker image PRs by the bare image name (Renovate's default prepends a 'dependency ' noun).
Mastodon ships its web/sidekiq image and the streaming image in lockstep at the same version, so group their updates into one PR.

LinuxServer.io tags embed a build hash and -lsNN rebuild counter (1.43.2.10687-563d026ea-ls311); default docker versioning treats that suffix as a compatibility variant that must match exactly, so updates are never offered. Parse the tag explicitly instead.
Same LinuxServer.io problem for emby, whose tags look like 4.9.5.0-ls283 (no build hash).
Same LinuxServer.io problem for kometa, whose tags look like v2.4.4-ls103.
